description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script of the build job, install git, register QEMU static binaries with multiarch/qemu-user-static, clone and build manifest-tool version v0.9.0 using make and install it, copy qemu-static-conf files to /lib/binfmt.d, and log in to Docker Hub using the DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN and DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD variables. Then in the script step run make. No caches, artifacts, or deployments are defined.
